subcodes.first_line: The Hidden hath been made manifest, and the Treasured hath spoken forth, and the Lote Tree hath proclaimed: "The Day of God, the Single Sovereign, hath come!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر المکنون و نطق المخزون و نادت السدره قد اتی یوم الله الملک الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @transcendence; unknowability of God
